expectations.description: 결과 구조가 Button/index.tsx 또는 동급 folder/index 규칙을 따른다
expectations.evidence: Output file is at components/common/button/index.tsx, following the folder/index convention.

expectations.description: flat components/Button.tsx 파일이 그대로 남지 않는다 (중복 제거)
expectations.evidence: No flat Button.tsx or button.tsx file exists in the outputs directory. Only components/common/button/index.tsx exists.
Interface is declared as 'export interface ButtonProps' at line 5 of components/common/button/index.tsx.
Component is declared as 'const Button = ({ ... }: ButtonProps) => {' at line 13, which is an arrow function.
ButtonProps includes 'children: ReactNode' and the component renders '{children}' inside the button element. Showcase page uses <Button>기본 버튼</Button> with children.

ButtonProps includes 'variant?: "primary" | "secondary"' with default 'primary'. The component applies different className based on variant value. Showcase page uses both default and variant='secondary'.

expectations.description: showcase page의 import가 새 구조에 맞게 정리된다
expectations.evidence: Showcase page imports Button from '@/components/common/button' (line 1), which correctly resolves to the new folder/index.tsx structure.

expectations.description: useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, useMutation 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: Grep search for useEffect|fetch(|axios|useQuery|useMutation across all output files returned no matches.

summary: All 8 expectations passed. The Button component was correctly refactored to a folder/index convention (components/common/button/index.tsx), no flat duplicate remains, ButtonProps interface is preserved, arrow function syntax is used, children and variant props work correctly, showcase page imports are updated, and no side-effect hooks or data-fetching calls are present.
eval_feedback: Perfect score. The refactoring was clean and complete, following all structural and behavioral requirements.
